subject: [PATCH v8 01/15] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers (pte_protnone and pmd_protnone) from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING, making them available independently of NUMA balancing. The capability to detect present-but-inaccessible page table entries is useful beyond NUMA balancing and is now enabled for six architectures that support it (x86_64, arm64, powerpc, s390, riscv, loongarch). The patch introduces a new configuration option CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE, which depends on the presence of protnone PTEs. This change does not introduce any functional changes and only reorganizes the code to make it more modular and flexible.
